We are yet to see the cycle-top buyers capitulate their coins, which is historically a good indication that the cyclical lows are in.

It does look like we have the macro recipe for it in the coming month or two.

If presented, I think buying a 5-handle bitcoin in the next month https://t.co/ujEfBInyGm

tweets.author: CavanXy
tweets.text:
When Bitcoin rallies against the grain of banks, it usually ends up being a local rally rather than a structural swing higher.

Something to keep in mind if adding fresh longs here. https://t.co/Q4PWFwc2fd

Well, I thought China might increasing its own supply of Urea Fertilizer to meet the supply shortage from Middle East, but looks like the opposite is happening. Making sure it can fully supply itself 1st & Urea prices are just jumping very high now.

Agricultural yield globally https://t.co/DN7RzChC17 https://t.co/jDE9ui5f58

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text: Status of BYD's Solid State Battery program. Chongqing Bishan factory is building 20 GWh production line that will start limited production. Shenzhen Pingshan has a trial line already in production. This expects to enter mass production for large scale commercialization in 2030. https://t.co/atLgsbORF1

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
China's industrial production breakdown in Jan-Feb vs last yr is up 6.3% overall.

Biggest increase coming from industrial robot (31%), Smart Phones (13.7%), ICs (12.4%), Computers (14.2%) & rail/shipping equipment (13.7%).

Biggest drops in cars (-9.9%), solar batteries (-7.8%) https://t.co/kWXuIHM7dT

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
China may have the most unorthodox mix for its olefin production (for plastics, chemical etc), but its still heavily dependent on crude.

See below, ethylene production is 68% from cracking crude, 23 (CTO/MTO), 7.7% (ethane cracking)
Propylene is 45% from crude, 30% propane, 17% https://t.co/0aSNyfYc2x

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
BYD is very commited to Brazil. It's investing R$ 300m to build an Automotive Testing & Eval Center in Rio.

Goal is to test & adapt its EVs for the Latam mkt + showcasing its tech. Will be similar to its track in Zhengzhou.

Work expects to start later this yr & complete by 2028 https://t.co/FusUd8onxs

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
China's Green Hydrogen pricing dropped from 27.89 to 26.9 RMB/kg last yr. This varies across the country. Inner Mongolia would be the lowest. Further drop to below 25 would require massive scaling that should happen this yr.

Green Methanol & ammonia production are both expected https://t.co/j54Z7RQn5A https://t.co/0Spi1sY8CQ

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
DingTalk serves > 20m enterprises & 800m users
Wukongg Agents can natively execute thousands of DingTalk core functions thru CLI.

Alibaba Token Hub/ATH was created to properly monetize the AI tools that Alibaba is building.

This is likely part of Ali's move to fully integrate https://t.co/FZ0vOoYOUe https://t.co/ccPnsMo6h7

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
See below:
Ethane cracking is the cheapest, followed by Coal to Olefin/CTO, PDH (propane de-hydrogenation), Methanol to Olefin/MTO & Naphta cracking.

Lower cost + supply security factor is fuel CTO/MTO expansion in China using DMTO-III tech. Allows also green methanol to olefin https://t.co/B7CwmeIrnf

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
Accelink is world's 1st 3.2T NPO transceiver supplier & it has already been validated by a domestic CSP.

This NPO uses 32x100G architecture w/ 21W power consumption. It's currently working on 6.4T SiPo NPO & 12.8T XPO.

Very interesting to see Accelink take this path since other https://t.co/U65GWwkcYd

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:

All were bw 9:45 & 10:17 Z9GT is the 1st to be delivered w/ Blade 2.0
Many other models are also arriving https://t.co/v8SHtalAwN
